title: Cuneiform Tablet #0067: Old Akkadian Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
